feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: russians are now Indians
entry.content: russians are now Indians

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /fwt/ - Friendly Windows Thread
entry.content: FAQ: >How do I activate Windows? HWID2 generates and registers a permanent legitimate license on MS's activation servers github.com/massgravel/Microsoft-Act ivation-Scripts Usage: paste this into Powershell, run. irm https://get.activated.win | iex >and Office? Same link, select Ohook option You can also use Office.com if your needs are very minimal or try OnlyOffice/LibreOffice and set it to save in MSOffice file formats >What version should I install? >W10 Enterprise IoT LTSC 2021 Binary ident

entry.title: /int/ International: Euros are in denial man
entry.content: A Euro I know tried to argue that a Euro doctoral program is better than an American one. As if your typical Euro grad student isn't trying to troubleshoot some instrument that he had cobbled together with the occasional part having a 'Made in West Germany' label because his university is too broke to drop a buck-fifty on bare minimum shit. All the while a mutt is bitching at his university over the fact that his equipment made in 2023 is beginning to get too old to use and who are scrambling to

entry.content: I'm summoning the maid computing auti- expert! Why can't an 11 inch Chromebook be used as a maid computer? It shoudl be possible to install linux or bsd on intel ones, and it's not like you'd need more than 8/128g for vim on fvwm or even console itself. Please explain why an expensive csg is needed. The form factor is almost the same and has a keyboard

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Wife is pregnant, wants me to sell my Q40 to get a truck or SUV since they're sa…
entry.content: Wife is pregnant, wants me to sell my Q40 to get a truck or SUV since they're safer. It's got 72k miles. Do you think this kind of car would ever become a collectors item? Trade is value is around $8k but I think it should be worth more... Not many NA sedans with bullet proof suspension and engines anymore getting ~320 hp stock. I've maintained it well and never put anything lower than premium in it. Runs very smooth and cosmetically looks nice. Or would hanging onto it just devalue it in 5-10 y

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I want to get a SWE job at Palantir
entry.content: Is it possible? I'm not a US citizen (and I'm not from india but from eastern europoo, if you're wondering). One of my friends from my country got offer from Palantir in London. He was just a regular Java backend dev before that. What does this company actually do besides mass surveillance? What do they ask in interviews?

entry.title: /mu/ Music: ZZ Top: Tejas [London, 1976] Touring the way this band does tears you up by the …
entry.content: ZZ Top: Tejas [London, 1976] Touring the way this band does tears you up by the roots, until the digs at Rolling Stone assume an authenticity lacking in the tales of the Pan-Am Highway. But this is the first trio to hark back to country music as well as blues, and they're brawnier than anything that comes out of Austin. You think Kinky Friedman will cover "Arrested for Driving While Blind"? C+

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I already own a pair or white platform chucks, I needed to get the black ones, a…
entry.content: I already own a pair or white platform chucks, I needed to get the black ones, and they were on sale. they are the bomb. along with them came these socks, copenhagen studios, love them as well, they go up to my knees, but chose to slouch them a bit. the shorts are old, they are not stretchy, which means they will last longer, but very tight, +2 kgs and I cannot put them on. now they are comfy, and I think they attract lots of attention. the navy tops were not the best choice, the color matching

No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. This is not going to be like that. entry.title: /int/ International: please explain, i'm retarded
entry.content: >the rockets' red glare >the bombs bursting in air what the hell? i mean, i don't know when that anthem was written, but SURELY rockets & bombs that "burst" in the sky (implying they were deployed from an aircraft of kind, which didn't even exist until well into the 20th century, and calling normal artillery "bombs" just seems off) didn't really exist at the time????

entry.title: /int/ International: Every 4th of July my father and brother drive around Virginia in their pickup tr…
entry.content: Every 4th of July my father and brother drive around Virginia in their pickup truck with baseball bats through residential neighborhoods. If they hear anybody speaking a language other than English or speaking in a foreign accent they will jump out the the truck and beat them with the bats and drive off. They've been to jail for this multiple times but refuse to stop. They call it a 'tradition' going back generations.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Alright, /b/, you guys are my only hope: It appears that Applicant for Death (an…
entry.content: Alright, /b/, you guys are my only hope: It appears that Applicant for Death (an eroguro doujinshi by Gotoh Juan) has been taken down from ExHentai. (....yeah, there was apparently a real-life crime in Vietnam based on that doujinshi, but I was still able to find it more than a year after said crime had taken place.) I was hoping to reread it, but other sites only have it in languages such as Italian. Would any of you happen to know where I can still find the English translation? Or even just mo

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Why Christianity Fails Morally
entry.content: Because it fails to define good and evil. Aristotle defined goodness as that which aligns with human flourishing—the pursuit of ultimate happiness, or *eudaimonia*: living a life of purpose, meaning, and rational activity in accordance with virtue, rather than simply chasing temporary pleasure. Conversely, as Augustine noted, evil is not necessarily the opposite of goodness; rather, it is the absence or deficiency of goodness, or a separation from it. This means that being good requires active p

entry.content: >"CAT BATH" Edition /ACT/ is a weekly Caturday thread dedicated to cats and other felines. Calling all artists and writers: Feel free to post your art, stories, and WIPs! entry.title: /g/ Technology: uninstall kde now or you will get hacked!
entry.content: kde has a MAJOR bug that lets anyone run programs, scripts, malware, etc with full system access. >April 1 2026, 23:51 The first email was sent to security@kde.org >July 2 2026, 18:30 The exploit has exceeded a waiting period of 90 days whilst still active, so we proceed to publication. https://blog.kimiblock.top/2026/07/ 01/arbitrary-code-execution-in-kde- plasma/

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: What's even the purpose behind bothering to make a girlfriend?
entry.content: Why even bother to make one? You cant expect her to cook while you earn. You cant expect her to look after the kids (that is assuming if she even chooses motherhood in the first place). You cant share your emotions with her, she will take you as a weakling and a cuck and will delete whatever respect remained in her mind regarding your strength. You cant expect her to loyal & not cheat. The entire legal system and socio-political climate is ready to support her in case she betrays you. What else

entry.title: /g/ Technology: PlayBSD
entry.content: The Technical Feasibility of a BSD-Based PlayStation Compatibility OS The technical feasibility of creating a custom, open-source operating system to natively run PlayStation 4 software on standard PC hardware is a fascinating thought experiment that sits squarely at the intersection of kernel development and reverse engineering. The foundation of this concept is fundamentally sound: the PlayStation 4's native operating system, known internally as Orbis OS, is not a built-from-scratch proprietar

entry.content: Blacked capes Edition This thread is for anons that are into straight blacked/interracial content involving their waifus, without the extreme and political content of the main blacked thread. No 3D/real content. No graphs, headlines, tributes, or references to murder or suicide. No scat/toilet/gay shit This thread is focused on netorare/netorase, if your post doesn't involve a waifu in any way and you only want to talk about black men, take it to the other general. entry.title: /o/ Auto: How much rust is “too much rust”?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Veracrypt hidden volumes are based
entry.content: >cops seize your electronics >forced to hand over your password or rot in jail >give them decoy password that decrypts decoy files >court can't reasonably say you refused to hand over a password I live in a country where you can't be forced to hand over a password but laws can change.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: This game's existence is beyond baffling. Nobody even cared about the first one …
entry.content: This game's existence is beyond baffling. Nobody even cared about the first one outside of “that game you rented for a weekend” or “your cousin happened to have it and you messed around for a few hours”
